name: FaultsStatusUpdate
description: update on the outage, update on the reported fault, estimated time to fix

sampleUtterances.utterance: Any update on when the fault in my area will be sorted out?
Can you check if the service disruption is still ongoing?
Can you confirm if the outage work in my neighborhood is done?
Can you tell me the status of my open fault ticket?
Has the engineer finished working on the reported issue?
has the repair for my connection issues been completed yet?
Have engineers resolved the service interruption in my area yet?
How do I track the status of the ongoing outage?
How long until my broadband fault is fully resolved?
I want to see if the fault in my neighborhood was fixed.
I want to see if the technician has resolved my service problem.
I’d like to know if the fault ticket for my account is closed now.
I’m trying to find out if my internet fault has been fixed.
Is there an estimated time for the outage to end?
Is there new information on the installation delay?
